title: The Asteroid That Taught Us About Planet Formation

scenes.text: One tiny asteroid holds secrets about our solar system's origins.
Hayabusa2 brought back samples from asteroid Ryugu that reveal its building blocks.
These samples may explain how planets formed billions of years ago.
Understanding asteroids can reveal our own Earth's history.
scenes.label: EARTH'S HISTORY

scenes.text: Follow for a new science fact every day.

description: The Hayabusa2 mission has brought back samples that could reveal details about planet formation. Follow for daily science!
